# Third-Party Query Sources

This crate bundles Tree-sitter query files (`*.scm`) for syntax highlighting and language injections.

The queries were sourced from upstream repositories and copied into `languages/<lang>/`.
For each source, the original license text is vendored under `third_party/licenses/`.

## Sources

- `languages/bash/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter/tree-sitter-bash` @ `a06c2e4415e9` (MIT)
- `languages/c/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter/tree-sitter-c` @ `ae19b676b13b` (MIT)
- `languages/cpp/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter/tree-sitter-cpp` @ `12bd6f7e9608` (MIT)
- `languages/csharp/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter/tree-sitter-c-sharp` @ `485f0bae0274` (MIT)
- `languages/cmake/*.scm`
  - Source: `uyha/tree-sitter-cmake` @ `c7b2a71e7f8e` (MIT)
- `languages/css/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter/tree-sitter-css` @ `dda5cfc5722c` (MIT)
- `languages/diff/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter-grammars/tree-sitter-diff` @ `2520c3f934b3` (MIT)
- `languages/elixir/*.scm`
  - Source: `elixir-lang/tree-sitter-elixir` @ `d24cecee673c` (Apache-2.0)
- `languages/embedded-template/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter/tree-sitter-embedded-template` @ `3499d85f0a0d` (MIT)
- `languages/java/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter/tree-sitter-java` @ `e10607b45ff7` (MIT)
- `languages/make/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter-grammars/tree-sitter-make` @ `5e9e8f8ff338` (MIT)
- `languages/scala/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter/tree-sitter-scala` @ `97aead18d977` (MIT)
- `languages/sql/*.scm`
  - Source: `derekstride/tree-sitter-sql` @ `39489e8728db` (MIT)
- `languages/swift/*.scm`
  - Source: `alex-pinkus/tree-sitter-swift` @ `82a239e4c164` (MIT)
- `languages/toml/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter-grammars/tree-sitter-toml` @ `64b56832c2cf` (MIT)
- `languages/yaml/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter-grammars/tree-sitter-yaml` @ `7708026449be` (MPL-2.0)

- `languages/graphql/*.scm`
  - Source: `nvim-treesitter/nvim-treesitter` @ `b033ab331ca0` (Apache-2.0)
- `languages/python/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter/tree-sitter-python` @ `bffb65a8cfe4` (MIT)
- `languages/ruby/*.scm`
  - Source: `tree-sitter/tree-sitter-ruby` @ `71bd32fb7607` (MIT)
- `languages/dart/*.scm`
  - Source: `nvim-treesitter/nvim-treesitter` @ `b033ab331ca0` (Apache-2.0)
- `languages/kotlin/*.scm`
  - Source: `nvim-treesitter/nvim-treesitter` @ `b033ab331ca0` (Apache-2.0)
- `languages/lua/*.scm`
  - Source: `nvim-treesitter/nvim-treesitter` @ `b033ab331ca0` (Apache-2.0)

- `languages/markdown/*.scm`, `languages/markdown_inline/*.scm`
